course: ING400 - Negotiation and Agreement Processes in Engineering Projects

topics.title: Introduction to Engineering Project Processes
topics.description: Learn how engineering projects are initiated, organized, and managed from idea to completion.

topics.title: Parties, Roles and Responsibilities
topics.description: Understand the responsibilities and relationships between key stakeholders in engineering projects.

topics.title: Communication and Dialogue
topics.description: Develop effective communication skills for project teams, clients and suppliers.

topics.title: Negotiation Fundamentals
topics.description: Learn the principles, stages and objectives of successful negotiations.

topics.title: Negotiation Strategies
topics.description: Compare collaborative, competitive and hybrid negotiation approaches.

topics.title: Interests, Positions and BATNA
topics.description: Understand the difference between positions and interests, and how BATNA strengthens negotiations.

topics.title: Contracts and Agreement Processes
topics.description: Explore how contracts are negotiated, drafted and finalized in engineering projects.

topics.title: Interpretation of Contracts
topics.description: Learn how contract clauses are interpreted and applied in practice.

topics.title: Laws, Regulations and Standards
topics.description: Gain an overview of the legal framework governing engineering projects.

topics.title: Procurement and Tendering
topics.description: Understand procurement strategies, tender processes and supplier selection.

topics.title: Risk Allocation and Liability
topics.description: Learn how contractual risks and liabilities are distributed between parties.

topics.title: Changes, Claims and Disputes
topics.description: Study contract changes, claims management and dispute resolution techniques.

topics.title: Practical Negotiation Simulation
topics.description: Apply negotiation techniques in realistic engineering project scenarios.
